p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 new pass_to_pass repo_tests: test_webapp_lint (pnpm run lint --filter webapp), test_webapp_typecheck (pnpm run typecheck --filter webapp), test_webapp_unit_tests_simple (vitest run on 3 isolated test files: detectbadJsonStrings.test.ts, calculateNextSchedule.test.ts, validateGitBranchName.test.ts), test_webapp_build (pnpm run build --filter webapp). All 6 p2p tests (2 existing static + 4 new repo_tests) pass on base commit.

validate.notes: Docker build: PASS. NOP test: PASS (reward=0, fail_to_pass test correctly fails on base). Gold test: PASS (reward=1 after fixing solve.sh to update pnpm-lock.yaml - added 'pnpm install' after modifying package.json). Rubric judge: Returns 0.5 as fallback (no API keys available for LLM evaluation), not a genuine failure. Note: The gold test required manual intervention to run 'pnpm install' after solve.sh because the original solve.sh modifies package.json without updating the lockfile, causing --frozen-lockfile tests to fail.
